# OpenBALC

> Open source courses management and AI-powered learning platform.

OpenBALC is a high-performance workspace and open source education system designed to accelerate learning. It transforms static documents, textbook PDFs, and websites into structured study modules, offering active recall quizzes, interactive Reingold-Tilford mindmap visualizations, and context-aware chat.

## Core Features

- **Intelligent study modules**: Upload PDFs, text documents, or paste web URLs. OpenBALC parses, extracts, and organizes the knowledge into readable chapters.
- **Active recall quizzes**: Generate practice questions and multi-modal tests dynamically based on uploaded materials.
- **Contextual AI study assistant**: Chat directly with your documents. Receive grounded answers with exact source citations.
- **Interactive mindmaps**: Visualize conceptual structures and chapter hierarchies using advanced balanced mindmaps.
- **Collaborative workspaces**: Classmates, schools, or teams can synchronize study modules and learn in unified workspaces.
- **Credit-based economy**: Spend credits to trigger AI processing or earn credits by contributing high-quality open modules to the community library.

## Public Index
- [Home Page](https://openbalc.com/): Product overview and free public sandbox chat.
- [Solutions for Individuals](https://openbalc.com/solutions/individuals): Product detail and active recall science for self-directed students.
- [Solutions for Educators](https://openbalc.com/solutions/educators): Detail on curriculum locking, syllabus security, and university workspaces.
- [Solutions for Enterprises](https://openbalc.com/solutions/enterprises): Self-hosted hybrid RAG, corporate knowledge base setups, and security.
- [Public Modules Library](https://openbalc.com/modules): Explore community-generated study modules.
- [Pricing](https://openbalc.com/#pricing): View membership tiers and credit options.
- [Advertiser Portal](https://openbalc.com/ads): Run contextual sponsor assets in the learning buffer.

## Pricing Tiers

### Subscription Plans
- **Freemium** ($0 / ₹0): Up to 2 active modules, standard AI models, and community support.
- **Pro** ($10.00/mo or ₹840.00/mo; yearly saves 16%): Unlimited modules, advanced AI models, priority processing, and workspace creation.
- **Max** ($25.00/mo or ₹2100.00/mo; yearly saves 16%): Everything in Pro, early feature access, dedicated manager, and custom integrations.

### Credit Add-ons
Credits are valid for 12 months.
- **Micro** ($0.75 / ₹63) - 100 credits (~50 chats)
- **Boost** ($2.00 / ₹168) - 300 credits (~150 chats)
- **Popular** ($4.00 / ₹336) - 700 credits (~350 chats)
- **Pro** ($7.50 / ₹630) - 1,500 credits (~750 chats)
- **Power** ($15.00 / ₹1,260) - 3,500 credits
- **Max** ($30.00 / ₹2,520) - 8,000 credits

## Technical Architecture

OpenBALC is built on a modern hybrid search and retrieval model.
- **Hybrid RAG Pipeline**: Combines semantic embeddings with dense lexical search (reciprocal rank fusion, RRF) over a 7-step pipeline.
- **Type-Aware Chunking**: Extracts table structures, captions, and text, creating granular fragments stored in Supabase with structural metadata.
- **AI Buffer loading**: Integrates quotes or short sponsored media blocks during AI-processing periods, allowing users to earn credits organically.
